function:src/openhuman/channels/providers/irc.rs:IrcChannel::new(IrcChannelConfig {
            server: "irc.example.test".to_string(),
            port: 6697,
            nickname: "openhuman".to_string(),
            username: None,
            channels: vec!["#ops".to_string()],
            allowed_users,
            server_password: None,
            nickserv_password: None,
            sasl_password: None,
            verify_tls: false,
        }).is_user_allowed

function:src/openhuman/channels/providers/lark.rs:self
            .http_client()
            .post(format!("{}/callback/ws/endpoint", self.ws_base()))
            .header("locale", if self.use_feishu { "zh" } else { "en" })
            .json(&serde_json::json!({
                "AppID": self.app_id,
                "AppSecret": self.app_secret,
            }))
            .send()
            .await?
            .json::<WsEndpointResp>

function:src/openhuman/channels/providers/lark.rs:self
            .http_client()
            .post(format!("{}/callback/ws/endpoint", self.ws_base()))
            .header("locale", if self.use_feishu { "zh" } else { "en" })
            .json(&serde_json::json!({
                "AppID": self.app_id,
                "AppSecret": self.app_secret,
            })).send

function:src/openhuman/channels/providers/lark.rs:event
            .pointer("/message/create_time")
            .and_then(|t| t.as_str())
            .and_then(|t| t.parse::<u64>().ok())
            // Lark timestamps are in milliseconds
            .map(|ms| ms / 1000).unwrap_or_else

function:src/openhuman/channels/providers/presentation.rs:lines
        .iter()
        .filter(|line| {
            let trimmed = line.trim();
            trimmed.starts_with("- ")
                || trimmed.starts_with("* ")
                || trimmed.starts_with("| ")
                || trimmed.starts_with("# ")
                || trimmed.starts_with("## ")
                || trimmed.starts_with("### ")
                || is_numbered_list_item(trimmed)
        }).count

function:src/openhuman/channels/providers/qq.rs:data
            .get("access_token")
            .and_then(|t| t.as_str())
            .ok_or_else(|| anyhow::anyhow!("Missing access_token in QQ response"))?.to_string

function:src/openhuman/channels/providers/qq.rs:data
